hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [[ "$file" == *.go ]] && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && go fmt "$file" && go vet ./... 2>&1 | head -20 || true
cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [[ "$cmd" == *"git commit"* ]] && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && make lint 2>&1 || true

cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); if [[ "$cmd" == *"git commit"* ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && for p in $(git diff --cached --name-only -- '*.go' | xargs -n1 dirname 2>/dev/null | sort -u); do f=$(mktemp); go test -coverprofile="$f" "./$p/..." >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "$p: $(go tool cover -func="$f" | tail -1 | awk '{print $NF}')"; rm -f "$f"; done; fi; true

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *mocks_test.go || "$file" == *mock_*.go ]]; then echo "Generated by mockery — never hand-edit. Change the source interface and run 'make mock' instead." >&2; exit 2; fi
